title: Bodycam footage of arrest of Ronald B. Hatten for identity theft / fake ID vehicle purchase attempt in Cape Coral on June 11, 2025

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Florida Sunshine Law, I hereby request the following records:

All body-worn camera (BWC) footage, dashcam video, and any related audio/video recordings from the response and arrest on June 11, 2025 at approximately 6:09 PM regarding a fraud disturbance at a residence in Cape Coral. The incident involved Ronald B. Hatten (or the suspect using a fake driver's license) attempting to fraudulently purchase a 2023 Mercedes G-Wagon using stolen identity information belonging to a Cape Coral resident. The suspect was charged with two counts of Criminal Use of Personal Identification Information.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Daniel Wilkinson

title: Bodycam footage of arrest of Cheryl Annette Jefferson on Flagler County fugitive warrant for property fraud, March 2026

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Florida Sunshine Law, I hereby request the following records:

All body-worn camera (BWC) footage, dashcam video, and any related audio/video recordings from the arrest of Cheryl Annette Jefferson (age 63, of Bartow, FL) on the Flagler County fugitive warrant for organized scheme to defraud over $50,000. The arrest occurred on or about March 20–24, 2026 in DeFuniak Springs with assistance from DeFuniak Springs Police Department. The case involves a two-year investigation into fraudulent sale of properties in Flagler County (S-Section and W-Section lots) that the suspect did not own, using fake identification and wire transfers.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Daniel Wilkinson

title: Bodycam footage of arrest of Luigi Audi for organized fraud / property deed scam in Daytona Beach, 2026

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Florida Sunshine Law, I hereby request the following records:

All body-worn camera (BWC) footage, dashcam video, and any related audio/video recordings from the arrest and/or investigation of Luigi Audi (age 65) on multiple counts of fraud, including organized scheme to defraud and grand theft, related to filing fake deeds and stealing properties left by his late son (totaling over $1.6 million).

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Daniel Wilkinson

To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the California Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

All documents produced by Deputy Michael Thomas, Jacy Dardine, and other county official pertaining to the seeking any warrant on Binford Road between January 1, 2026 to April 12, 2026.  This should include all documents submitted to the court for obtaining the warrant, and the courts order.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 calendar days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Robbie Powelson

title: Bodycam footage of arrest of Mikhail Vasilev for credit card fraud on or about August 8, 2025 in Palm Coast, FL

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Florida Sunshine Law, I hereby request the following records:

All body-worn camera (BWC) footage, dashcam video, and any related audio/video recordings from the arrest of Mikhail Vasilev (DOB approximately 1982, age 43), a Russian national living in Palm Coast, on or about August 8, 2025. The arrest was for grand theft, petit theft, and fraudulent use of credit cards related to a construction scam involving unauthorized use of victims' credit cards for home repair materials and personal purchases.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Daniel Wilkinson
